signals.headline: South Korea's annual CPI inflation rose to 2
signals.raw: South Korea's annual CPI inflation rose to 2.2% YoY in March 2026 (from 2.0% in February), undershooting market consensus of 2.3-2.4% due to government fuel caps despite rising oil prices.**[1][2][3]
